content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad sectoral participation today: Bank Nifty +0.79%, Pharma +1.60%, PSU Banks +1.08%, Realty +1.00%, IT +0.66%. VIX cooling -2.46% to 17.47. Global cues firm (S&P +0.81%, Nasdaq +1.03%). However, Nifty already faded from intraday high 24250 to 24087 — momentum waning into mid-day; book is heavily deployed at 65% with 12 CNC positions, so focus is on managing the book, trailing winners, not adding correlated risk.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.5% unrealized; SL 1035 is already at breakeven+. CMP 1053, SL 1035 = 1.7% gap, still tight enough that pushing higher risks self-stopout. Q4 strong, sub-1% GNPA. HOLD existing SL — no MODIFY needed (no-op). Keeping HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge -1.1%. Gold consolidating; SL 119 at 3.8% below CMP gives room. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8% unrealized; current SL already at 1715 (breakeven+ vs 1700 entry). CMP 1729, SL 1715 = 0.8% gap — already TIGHT, below 1% trail floor. No MODIFY needed; this is a no-op MODIFY. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Slightly negative -0.9%; Q4 was strong (PAT +68% YoY, GNPA -140bps), banking sector +0.79% but Bandhan only +0.44%. SL 206, CMP 207.7 — only 0.8% buffer, but stop is below recent swing low. Hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4595.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8% gain, SL still at entry 4575. Trail to 4595 (just above entry, locks +0.4% = breakeven+commission). CMP 4656, new SL 4595 = 1.3% gap — within trail floor. Defence narrative intact, new CMD catalyst, +6% rally yesterday."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.8% unrealized but Q4 PAT +124% YoY, FY26 sales +30% YoY. SL 1420, CMP 1436 = 1.2% buffer. Realty sector +1.0% today. Honor SL; don't trail in either direction."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6975.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.0% gain. Current SL 6950 already above entry 6900. Tightening to 6975 — CMP 7052, SL 6975 = 1.1% gap, just at trail floor. Q4 PAT +124% YoY, EBITDA margin 34.2%, Geojit Rs 8500 target. Strong setup."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock was up +8.4% intraday before fading to flat. SL 820, CMP 834 = 1.7% buffer. Order book Rs 13,955 cr, Jefferies Buy at 810. Hold to current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.3%; just made 52w high today. Q4 PAT +31% YoY, AUM +16%. SL 358, CMP 369 = 3% buffer. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.7% gain, breaking above 52w high. Tightening SL from 805 to 815 — CMP 824.85, new SL 815 = 1.2% gap, within trail floor. Locks in small gain on FMCG defensive that broke out today."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8%; Q4 PAT +42% YoY, FY26 record profits, dividend Rs 33. SL 3245, CMP 3278 = 1% buffer. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1% post-Q4 gap-up. SL 1215, CMP 1267 = 4.1% buffer. Wide enough; daily MACD bearish so won't trail aggressively until consolidation forms. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 already at breakeven+; CMP 1053 = 1.7% gap, sufficient. Sub-1% GNPA, MOFSL Buy. Let it run to target 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, SL 119 leaves room for normal gold volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 already locks gain; gap to CMP only 0.8% but tightening further would self-stopout. Hold as-is."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong, sector participating; let SL 206 do its job."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4595.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from entry 4575 to 4595 (breakeven+) on +1.8% gain. 1.3% gap to CMP 4656."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.8%, near SL but Q4 outstanding. Honor 1420 SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 6975.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL 6950 → 6975, locking in +1.1% on +2% gain. 1.1% gap to CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Faded from intraday high; SL 820 fine, 1.7% buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high; SL 358 gives 3% buffer for normal pullback after breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail 805 → 815 on 52w high breakout; lock entry+. 1.2% gap to CMP 824."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal red, strong Q4. SL 3245 fine."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Post-gap consolidation; wide SL appropriate to absorb chop. Don't trail yet."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AJANTPHARM, LINDEINDIA, NIFTYBEES, COFORGE — all interesting but book is at 65% deployed across 12 names. Adding more would push past sector caps and create position-management overhead. HFCL pending BUY at 133.50 from earlier still OPEN — leaving it; if not filled by EOD it will auto-cancel. No new entries today: book already heavily exposed, NIFTY fading from intraday high, and existing positions need monitoring more than fresh adds. PNBHOUSING/HAL/NAVINFLUOR/MARICO are working — let them run to targets.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is materially long-bias with 12 CNC positions at 65% deployed. Sector concentration: Financial Services 3 names (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK, ABCAPITAL) — within cap. Capital Goods 2 (HAL, TITAGARH). Chemicals 1 (NAVINFLUOR). No single sector >35%. Today's action focused on trailing winners (HAL, NAVINFLUOR, MARICO) to lock breakeven+ while respecting 1% trail-floor discipline. Realized P&L still modestly positive (+5,340 cumulative), unrealized +5,154 — the book is finally working. Avoiding new entries to prevent over-deployment and same-cluster stacking. HFCL pending order flagged — will let market decide; not stacking a second."
}
